title: RitsuLib shell theme (W3C Design Tokens Format Module)
description: Theme document organized as core (primitives), semantic (alias), and components (component tokens with states). Each leaf token is an object with $value and $type per W3C DTFM. Layered overrides live under scopes.{shell|modSettings|mod:<id>}; free-form mod data lives under extensions.<modId>.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editors.

inherits.description: Parent theme id; this theme is layered on top.

tokenGroup.description: DTFM token group; child entries are either nested groups or leaf tokens.

tokenLeaf.description: DTFM leaf token. $value carries the literal or a {ref.path}; $type names the value kind.

$value.description: Literal value or a reference of the form {path.to.token}.

$type.description: Value kind; constrains how $value is interpreted.

scopesMap.description: Per-scope overrides. Keys are scope ids: shell, modSettings, or mod:<modId>.

additionalProperties.description: Each scope may contribute its own core/semantic/components subtrees.

extensionsMap.description: Free-form per-mod extension blobs. Keys are mod ids; values are arbitrary JSON consumed by the owning mod.
